prompt: Review this PR. It's a Python utility library and the PR adds a caching module. There are no UI components or frontend code in this repo.
assertions: The report identifies the race condition in cache invalidation
The report identifies the negative TTL edge case
The report identifies the bare except clause
New pytest tests were created for the cache module
The report correctly states that no UI/e2e testing is needed
No e2e tests were created (since there is no UI)
The bare except clause was fixed to catch specific exceptions
The negative TTL handling was fixed
A pr-review-report.md file was generated with all required sections
A git commit was created with the fixes and new tests
The report does NOT mention missing UI testing as a gap
